name: search
description: Search for stops and places in Norway via Entur geocoder. Use this to find stop IDs (NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S) or resolve place names before using trip, departures, or stop. Returns an array of matches, each with id, name, label, county, locality, and coordinates. Do not use for trip planning, departure times, or stop details.

query.description: Search query: stop name, place name, or address in Norway. Case-insensitive substring match.

name: trip
description: Plan a public transit journey between two places in Norway. Use this for route planning with optional departure/arrival time constraints and transport mode filters. Returns an array of trip options, each with departure time, arrival time, duration, walk distance, and leg details. For real-time departure times, use departures instead. For stop/platform details, use stop instead.

from_place.description: Origin: place name (e.g., 'Porsgrunn') or stop ID in NSR format (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872). Use search to resolve place names to IDs.

to.description: Destination: place name (e.g., 'Oslo lufthavn') or stop ID in NSR format (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:269). Use search to resolve place names to IDs.

time.description: Departure or arrival time as ISO 8601 datetime (e.g., 2025-03-01T08:00:00). Optional; defaults to now if not specified.

arrive.description: If true, interpret time as arrival time. If false (default), interpret as departure time. Only applies when time is set.

modes.description: Comma-separated list of transport modes to include. Valid values: bus, rail, tram, metro, water, air, coach. Optional; includes all modes if empty or omitted.

name: departures
description: Get real-time departure board for a specific stop in Norway. Use this to check upcoming departures with line numbers, destinations, and real-time delay information. Returns stop name, stop ID, and an array of departures with times and delay data when available. For trip planning, use trip instead. For stop details (platforms, quays, coordinates), use stop instead.

stop_id.description: Stop ID in NSR format (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S, NSR:StopPlace:269 for Oslo lufthavn). Use search to find valid stop IDs.

limit.description: Maximum number of departures to return. Must be a positive integer. Default is 10.

name: stop
description: Get detailed information about a specific stop in Norway, including its location and layout. Use this to retrieve platform (quay) information, coordinates, or stop metadata. Returns stop ID, name, latitude, longitude, and an array of quays with their IDs and names. For departure times, use departures instead. For trip planning, use trip instead.

stop_id.description: Stop ID in NSR format (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S, NSR:StopPlace:269 for Oslo lufthavn). Use search to find valid stop IDs.
